headline: Trump's BORDER CZAR TOM HOMAN рҹӣЎпёҸрҹҮәрҹҮё DROPS into MINNEAPOLIS рҹ’Ҙрҹҡ”!
text:
DONALD J. TRUMP рҹҚҠрҹҰ… unleashing his FIERCE BORDER TSAR рҹ‘‘рҹӣЎпёҸ TOM HOMAN рҹ”ҘрҹҳӨ on MINNEAPOLIS after FED AGENTS рҹ’Әрҹ”« POPPED TWO US CITIZENS рҹҳөрҹ’Ҙ in LESS THAN A MONTH рҹ—“пёҸрҹҳұ! White House spilling the TEA вҳ•рҹ“ў: Homan, 64yo NY BEEFCAKE рҹҘ©рҹ•¶пёҸ from UPSTATE SNOWLAND вқ„пёҸрҹҢЁпёҸ, now MAIN DADDY рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’јрҹ’Ұ 'on the ground' meeting CITY SIMPS рҹӨЎрҹҸҷпёҸ while GREGORY BOVINO рҹҘ·рҹ“Ў вҖ“ the MASS DEPORT рҹҡҖрҹ‘Ӣ BORDER PATROL BOSS вҖ“ packs his BAGS рҹ§івңҲпёҸ and BOUNCES with his AGENT SQUAD рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ‘Ҙ!

Homan's LEGENDARY рҹҸҶрҹ“ң: Started as COP рҹҡ”рҹ‘®вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ in '84, SLAYED southern Cali BORDER рҹҸңпёҸрҹҮІрҹҮҪ, climbed ICE рҹ§Ҡрҹ”Ҙ ranks under OBAMA рҹ‘ҙрҹ•¶пёҸ as ENFORCEMENT REMOVAL BOSS рҹ§№рҹҡӘ by 2013! Planned RETIREMENT рҹҸ–пёҸрҹҚ№ in 2017 but JOHN KELLY рҹ“һрҹ’Ҙ called at his PARTY рҹҺүрҹҘӮ: 'POTUS WANTS YOU BACK, BRO! рҹ«ЎрҹҮәрҹҮё' вҖ“ Homan like 'HELL YEAH рҹ’Ҝрҹ”Ҙ!' Same VIBE in 2024 with SUSIE WILES рҹ“Ірҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ’ј yanking him from RETIREMENT HEAVEN рҹҳҮвҳҒпёҸ!

'BORDER TSAR' = INFORMAL GOD-KING рҹ‘‘рҹӣЎпёҸ overseeing MULTI-AGENCY IMMIGRATION MAYHEM рҹҡ«рҹ‘Ҫ across DEPT OF HOMELAND SECURITY рҹҸ°рҹӣЎпёҸ вҖ“ NO SENATE CUCKS рҹӨЎвң… needed, STRAIGHT TRUMP PICK рҹҚҶрҹ‘Қ! VOWING to NAIL 'WORST OF THE WORST' рҹҳҲрҹҡ” first, but SNAGS ALL ILLEGALS рҹ‘ӢрҹҢҚ cuz SANCTUARY CITIES рҹҸҷпёҸрҹҡ« are SABOTAGING рҹҗҚрҹҳ ! 'BEING HERE ILLEGALLY IS A CRIME, DUH! рҹ§ рҹ’Ҙ' Homan ROARS at WH PRESSERS рҹ—ЈпёҸрҹ“ё вҖ“ 'DON'T TELL ICE TO GHOST ARRESTS UNLESS SERIOUS RAP SHEET рҹ“ңрҹ”’ вҖ“ THAT'S INVITING THE WORLD TO CRASH THE PARTY рҹҺүрҹҡӘ!' рҹҳӨрҹҢҺ

SEPT BOMBSHELL рҹ’Јрҹ“°: Bribery BEEF рҹӨ‘рҹ’° ($50K from UNDERCOVER FEDS рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹӨ‘) DROPPED рҹҡ«рҹ“ү by DOJ when TRUMP 2.0 ROLLED IN рҹҘірҹҚҠ вҖ“ PRESS SEC KAROLINE LEAVITT рҹ’…рҹ“ў calls it ENTRAP TRAP рҹӨҸрҹҳҲ on KEY ALLY! Meanwhile, BOVINO рҹҘ·рҹҢӘпёҸ вҖ“ NC NATIVE since '96, CRACKDOWN KING рҹ‘‘рҹ”Ҙ in LA/CHI/NOLA/MINN вҖ“ 'TURN & BURN' рҹҡҖрҹ”Ҙ swift ARRESTS before PROTESTERS рҹӘ§рҹҳЎ swarm! Spars with LAWMAKERS рҹӨјвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹҸӣпёҸ from BOTH SIDES рҹҳ рҹ“ў, answers to KRISTI NOEM рҹҸӣпёҸрҹҗ• & MICHAEL BANKS/RODNEY SCOTT duo рҹӣЎпёҸрҹ“Ў!

WH SWAP рҹ’Ҙрҹ”„ seen as POLITICAL GLOW-UP вңЁрҹҳҸ amid PUBLIC FREAKOUT рҹҳұрҹ“ұ вҖ“ but LORA RIES @ HERITAGE рҹҸӣпёҸрҹ”ҙ says 'HOMAN'S ICE VET рҹ§Ҡрҹ’Ә means BUSINESS AS USUAL вҖ“ WORST FIRST, but ALL DEPORTABLES ON THE MENU рҹҚҪпёҸрҹ‘Ӣ!' Activist MICHAEL LUKENS рҹҳўрҹҶҳ calls him FAMILY SEPARATION ARCHITECT рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘§вҖҚрҹ‘Ұрҹ’” & 'POLISHED DEPORT DADDY рҹ’…рҹ—ЈпёҸ better at SPINNING рҹҢҖрҹ“ә than rough BOVINO!' No MODERATE HERE, bby вҖ“ it's DEPORT ORGY рҹ’ҰрҹҡҖ non-stop! TRUMP'S WALL STREET рҹ§ұрҹ’°? Nah, BORDER WALL TSAR SLAYING рҹҳҚрҹ”Ә! вҖјпёҸрҹҮәрҹҮёрҹҰ…
